query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, a.weekStartDate, a.weekEndDate, a.timeBlocks, a.confirmedAt
FROM worker w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name = '測試員工'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC;
